spans.content: I am interested in Computer Vision and NLP topics from research and development perspective.
I have experience in these fields in the past over 3.5 years both in industry and academia.
I also focussed on time series analysis and signal processing.
My development projects are available as open-source contributions at GitHub
current research profile can be accessed at Google Scholar
